DentalPage.metaDesc: Professional websites for dentists that generate new patients. Online scheduling, WhatsApp follow-up, and local SEO.

DentalPage.faq1Q: How much does a dental clinic website cost?
DentalPage.faq1A: Our plans start at $499 USD for a professional site with contact form and basic SEO. The Growth plan includes scheduling and WhatsApp.
DentalPage.faq2Q: Does it include online appointment booking?
DentalPage.faq2A: Yes. Growth and Enterprise plans include an integrated scheduling system with automatic WhatsApp reminders.
DentalPage.faq3Q: How does lead follow-up help me?
DentalPage.faq3A: Every person who visits your site and leaves their info receives automatic follow-up. This significantly increases the rate of patients who actually show up.
DentalPage.faq4Q: Can I showcase my clinic's services and specialties?
DentalPage.faq4A: Yes. Your site will have dedicated sections for each service: orthodontics, implants, cosmetic dentistry, cleanings, etc. With clear descriptions that help patients decide.
DentalPage.faq5Q: Does the site work well on mobile phones?
DentalPage.faq5A: Yes. All our sites are 100% responsive and look perfect on phones, tablets, and computers. Most patients search for a dentist from their phone.
DentalPage.faq6Q: How long does it take to build my dental website?
DentalPage.faq6A: A Starter site is delivered in 1 week. Sites with scheduling and automations take 2-3 weeks. We give you a clear timeline from day one.

BlogPage.metaDesc: Articles, guides, and resources about web design, AI automation, and digital marketing for service businesses.
BlogPage.title: Resources to grow your business
BlogPage.subtitle: Practical articles about web design, automation, and AI for service businesses.
BlogPage.post1Title: 5 Reasons Your Business Needs AI Automation
BlogPage.post1Desc: Discover how AI automation can transform your service business, from client acquisition to post-sale follow-up.
BlogPage.post2Title: How Much Does a Website Cost in 2026?
BlogPage.post2Desc: Everything you need to know about web design costs: what's included, what factors affect pricing, and how to choose.
BlogPage.post3Title: Automate Customer Service with WhatsApp AI
BlogPage.post3Desc: Learn how to set up an AI agent on WhatsApp that responds, qualifies leads, and books appointments 24/7.
BlogPage.post4Title: Local SEO: How to Rank on Google Maps
BlogPage.post4Desc: Practical local SEO guide for service businesses. Optimize your Google Maps and local search presence.
BlogPage.post1_s1Title: What AI Automation Really Means for Service Businesses
BlogPage.post1_s1Text: AI automation is not about replacing people — it is about eliminating the repetitive tasks that drain your time. For service businesses like dental clinics, real estate agencies, and restaurants, this means automating appointment reminders, lead follow-up, invoice generation, and customer support. Instead of hiring extra staff to handle these tasks, an AI system works around the clock, never forgets a follow-up, and responds to inquiries in seconds. The result is fewer missed opportunities and more revenue with the same team.
BlogPage.post1_s2Title: The Three AI Tools Driving Business Growth in 2026
BlogPage.post1_s2Text: Three technologies are transforming small businesses right now. First, AI chatbots on WhatsApp and web that qualify leads and book appointments automatically. Second, workflow automation platforms like n8n and Make.com that connect your CRM, email, calendar, and invoicing into seamless processes. Third, AI-powered marketing tools that create personalized campaigns, optimize ad spend, and predict which leads are most likely to convert. Together, these tools can save 15 to 20 hours per week of manual work.
BlogPage.post1_s3Title: How to Start Automating Your Business Today
BlogPage.post1_s3Text: You do not need to automate everything at once. Start with the highest-impact area: usually lead response time. Studies show that responding to a new lead within 5 minutes increases conversion by 400 percent. Set up a WhatsApp chatbot or automated email sequence that instantly acknowledges new inquiries and asks qualifying questions. From there, connect your CRM to automatically organize leads and trigger follow-up sequences. Most businesses see ROI within the first month of implementation.
BlogPage.post2_s1Title: What Determines the Cost of a Professional Website
BlogPage.post2_s1Text: Website pricing depends on four main factors: the number of pages, the complexity of features, the level of custom design, and ongoing maintenance needs. A simple 5-page informational site costs significantly less than an e-commerce platform with payment processing, inventory management, and user accounts. Other cost drivers include custom animations, multilingual support, CRM integrations, booking systems, and SEO optimization. Understanding these factors helps you make an informed investment rather than overpaying for features you do not need.
BlogPage.post2_s2Title: Typical Website Pricing in 2026: What to Expect
BlogPage.post2_s2Text: In 2026, professional websites for small businesses typically range from 497 to 4997 USD depending on scope. A starter website with 3 to 5 pages, responsive design, basic SEO, and a contact form starts around 497 USD. A growth package with 8 to 15 pages, advanced SEO, blog integration, WhatsApp chat, and CRM connection runs 1497 to 2497 USD. Enterprise solutions with custom functionality, e-commerce, automation workflows, and multilingual support start at 2997 USD. Always ask what is included in maintenance, hosting, and future updates.
BlogPage.post2_s3Title: How to Choose the Right Investment for Your Business
BlogPage.post2_s3Text: The right budget depends on what your website needs to accomplish. If your goal is simply to establish online credibility, a starter site works. If you need your website to actively generate leads and bookings, invest in the growth tier with SEO, automation, and conversion optimization. Calculate the lifetime value of a single new customer — if one client is worth 500 USD or more, a website that brings even 2 new clients per month pays for itself quickly. Think of your website as a salesperson who works 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
BlogPage.post3_s1Title: Why WhatsApp Is Your Most Powerful Sales Channel
BlogPage.post3_s1Text: WhatsApp has over 2 billion users worldwide, and in Latin America, it is the primary communication channel for 96 percent of internet users. Your customers are already on WhatsApp — they check it dozens of times per day. When a potential client sends you a message, they expect a fast reply. The problem is that most businesses take hours or even days to respond, and by then the lead has gone to a competitor. An AI-powered WhatsApp agent changes this completely by responding instantly, 24 hours a day.
BlogPage.post3_s2Title: What an AI WhatsApp Agent Can Do for You
BlogPage.post3_s2Text: A modern AI WhatsApp agent does far more than send automatic replies. It can hold natural conversations, answer frequently asked questions about your services and pricing, qualify leads by asking the right questions, book appointments directly into your calendar, send payment links, and follow up with leads who did not convert on the first interaction. The AI learns from your business context — your services, prices, availability, and tone of voice — so responses feel personal and professional, not robotic.
BlogPage.post3_s3Text: Businesses that implement WhatsApp AI automation typically see response times drop from hours to seconds, lead qualification rates improve by 60 percent, and appointment no-show rates decrease by 35 percent thanks to automatic reminders. One dental clinic reduced their receptionist workload by 70 percent while actually booking more appointments. A real estate agency captured 3 times more leads from their website by adding a WhatsApp button connected to an AI agent. The key is that automation handles the routine so your team can focus on closing deals.
BlogPage.post4_s1Title: What Is Local SEO and Why It Matters for Your Business
BlogPage.post4_s1Text: Local SEO is the practice of optimizing your online presence so that your business appears when people nearby search for your services. When someone searches for dentist near me or best restaurant in my area, Google shows a map with three local businesses — this is called the Local Pack, and appearing here can generate 50 percent or more of your website traffic. Unlike paid ads, local SEO brings free, consistent traffic from people who are actively looking for what you offer.
BlogPage.post4_s2Title: The 5 Pillars of Local SEO Success
BlogPage.post4_s2Text: Five elements determine your local search ranking. First, a complete and optimized Google Business Profile with accurate hours, services, photos, and categories. Second, consistent NAP — your business Name, Address, and Phone number must be identical across all directories and your website. Third, customer reviews — businesses with more positive reviews rank higher and convert more visitors. Fourth, local content on your website that mentions the areas you serve. Fifth, quality backlinks from local directories, chambers of commerce, and industry associations.
BlogPage.post4_s3Title: Quick Wins: Rank Higher in Your City This Month
BlogPage.post4_s3Text: Start with these actions today. Claim and fully complete your Google Business Profile — add all services, upload 10 or more high-quality photos, write a keyword-rich description, and set your service area. Ask your 5 best clients to leave Google reviews this week. Make sure your website has your city name in the page title, meta description, and at least one H1 heading. Create a dedicated page for each service you offer in each city you serve. Add schema markup to your website so Google understands your business type, location, and services. These steps alone can move you from page 3 to the Local Pack within weeks.

HomeFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
HomeFaq.faq1A: We're a digital agency offering three services: professional website design, AI automation (WhatsApp, CRM, lead follow-up), and AI-powered digital marketing. Everything designed so your business gets more clients without more manual effort.
HomeFaq.faq2Q: How long does a typical project take?
HomeFaq.faq2A: It depends on the service. A Starter website is delivered in 1 week. More complex sites take 2-4 weeks. Automations take 1-8 weeks depending on the package. We give you a clear timeline from the first call.
HomeFaq.faq3Q: Do you work with clients outside of Mexico?
HomeFaq.faq3A: Yes. We serve clients across Latin America, the United States, Spain, and anywhere in the world. Our entire process is remote and our sites are bilingual by default.
HomeFaq.faq4Q: Can I hire just one service or do I need all three?
HomeFaq.faq4A: You can hire only what you need. Many clients start with a website and add automations later. There's no obligation to buy combined packages.
HomeFaq.faq5Q: Do you offer a free consultation?
HomeFaq.faq5A: Yes. We offer a free 20-minute strategy call with no commitment. We'll advise you on which services you need and give you a clear plan.
HomeFaq.faq6Q: What happens after my project is delivered?
HomeFaq.faq6A: We don't leave you on your own. All packages include technical support and training. Growth and Enterprise plans offer priority support and ongoing optimization.
HomeFaq.faq7Q: Do I need technical skills to use what you deliver?
HomeFaq.faq7A: No. Everything we deliver comes with included training and intuitive admin panels. If you can use WhatsApp, you can manage your website and automations.
HomeFaq.faq8Q: What makes AION different from other digital agencies?
HomeFaq.faq8A: We combine web design, AI automation, and marketing in a single team. You don't need to hire three separate agencies. Plus, we use artificial intelligence to optimize every process and deliver faster results.
HomeFaq.faq9Q: Is my data and my clients' data secure?
HomeFaq.faq9A: Yes. We use SSL-certified hosting, secure servers, and follow best practices for data protection. Your information and your clients' data is always protected.
HomeFaq.faq10Q: Can I see examples of previous projects?
HomeFaq.faq10A: Yes. You can view our portfolio with real projects including websites, automations, and marketing campaigns we've built for clients across different industries.

PrivacyPage.metaDesc: Learn how AION Automations protects your personal information and your clients' data. Privacy policy and data protection.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: At AION Automations, we take the protection of your personal information seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
PrivacyPage.section1Text: We collect only the information you voluntarily provide through our contact form: name, email address, company (optional), and your message. We do not collect browsing data for advertising purposes.
PrivacyPage.section2Text: We use your information exclusively to respond to your inquiry, send you the requested quote, and communicate with you about your project. We never sell, rent, or share your information with third parties for marketing purposes.
PrivacyPage.section3Text: Your information is transmitted via encrypted connection (SSL/TLS). Our servers are protected with industry-standard security practices. Only authorized personnel have access to contact data.
PrivacyPage.section4Text: Our site uses essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies (Vercel Analytics) to improve the experience. We do not use advertising tracking cookies.
PrivacyPage.section5Text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information at any time by emailing info@aionautomations.io.
PrivacyPage.section6Text: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at info@aionautomations.io.

TermsPage.metaDesc: Terms and conditions for AION Automations services. Web design, AI automation, and digital marketing.
TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: By using AION Automations services, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
TermsPage.section1Text: AION Automations provides website design, AI automation, and digital marketing services. The scope of each project is defined in the proposal or quote agreed upon by both parties.
TermsPage.section2Text: Each project begins with a free consultation. After accepting the quote, a delivery timeline is established. Revisions and changes are included as specified in the contracted package.
TermsPage.section3Text: Payments are made according to the terms agreed upon in the quote. We accept bank transfers and electronic payments. Specific details are provided at the start of each project.
TermsPage.section4Text: Upon full payment, the client receives complete rights to the design and content created specifically for their project. AION Automations reserves the right to showcase the work in its portfolio.
TermsPage.section5Text: All packages include a period of post-delivery technical support. Growth and Enterprise plans include ongoing priority support as specified in the proposal.
TermsPage.section6Text: AION Automations is committed to delivering professional-quality work as agreed. We are not responsible for specific business results, as these depend on multiple factors outside our control.
TermsPage.section7Text: For questions about these terms, contact us at info@aionautomations.io.
